name: BIG4 Gold Coast Holiday Park
all_reviews_text:
Such a clean, tidy tropical park.  Lovely Cafe and bar with extensive menu at reasonable prices. Its right next to the pool so you can keep an eye on the kids.  The water park is large and fun, there's a games room and and and.
The location is a hilight too,  being easy walk to fast food outlets, next door to indoor GoKarts and a15 min walk to the theme parks opposite. If you don't want to walk, there's regular buses from the bus stop outside.   Perfect, thank you Big 4.

Great park, great location, friendly helpful staff

Best holiday park in Queensland for my family, the kids would rather stay at the park instead of going to Movie world or other attractions. The park is clean, friendly and full of things to do, the kids are never bored. It is a 10 out of 10 for us, that’s why we keep coming back.

Wow!
It’s been four years since we last stayed here and I don’t know why we’ve taken so long before we came back. Great location, Sites and Amenities are immaculate, and the Check in experience was flawless. Keep up the good work.

Maiden voyage for our new camper trailer, always enjoy the service and the amenities are top notch. Can't go wrong with all of the activities for the kids, also enjoy the adults happy hours and the bartenders with their Malibu Barbie cocktails!

One of the best Big 4 I have been to and keep coming back 😊😊😊😊😊

Loving our time at the Gold Coast BIG4. Spotted a Koala on the river trail walk thismorning with a full day of swimming for the kids and cocktails for mum and dad! Great location and friendly staff. 5 stars.

Incredible holiday park with everything the family with kids need. Close to Movie Walk and other attractions. This park has a waterpark, resort pool, cafe, children’s entertainment, etc. sites are huge!

Absolutely loved our stay at BIG4 Helensvale! The park is spotless, the staff are so friendly and welcoming, and the facilities for kids are amazing. Everything is so well maintained and there’s such a fun, relaxing family atmosphere. One of the best holiday parks we’ve stayed at — we already can’t wait to come back!

Got moved to a site to have no neighbours, creek camping is beautiful, amenities super clean, whole place well kept, nice atmosphere, lots of activities, friendly patrons and staff

At Helensvale Big 4, did build a bear activity with 8 year old son, we had so much fun and staff went to a lot of trouble to make it a great experience. Our bears are gorgeous and such a nice keepsake, thankyou for organising so many great activities for the kids, son wanting to get on the train ride but been too busy yet with all the other things he has been up to this visit, the flying fox is his favourite and whenever we decide to go camping he always wants to to to the flying fox park as it is now known in our Family.

We absolutely love staying at BIG4 Helensvale. The facilities are fantastic for all ages, and my children are always so excited to come here. The water slides are definitely a highlight and such a big hit with the kids! The park is clean, great amenitie block, family-friendly, and always has a great atmosphere. Highly recommend for a fun family getaway!

Absolutely wonderful park. Pool and waterpark and amazing, food and beverage options are spot on. Amenities are clean, and the added excitement  of checking out the tropical fish every time we go to the toilet makes for an even more memorable trip 🤣

Everything has been great accept I seem to be allergic to everything here the bed is very uncomfortable and the smell from them digging up the swamp is terrible.

We felt instantly welcomed at Big 4 Gold Coast, with a smooth and friendly check-in process that made arriving stress-free. The cabin was clean and well maintained, and there were plenty of fun activities to keep the kids entertained all day. It was a relaxing, family-friendly stay, and we would happily return again soon.

Great location, close to shops and theme parks. So much for the kids to do in the park too!!

Great location to the theme parks, but very disappointed with the muddy, boggy and smelly site. The construction works at 7:15am were very unwelcome too!

Lovely accommodation, very clean & comfortable. Location great for me as have family nearby & good facilities for my grandchildren/myself to enjoy.

Amazing family friendly accommodation! So many facilities for the kids, great location only a few minutes away from the theme park and the room we stayed in was perfect

Great relaxing spot and nice area

Our sites were rained out and pretty boggy, the staff happily upgraded us to 2 premium sites at no charge. Will be coming back

Rooms are clean.
Safety on water park is impressive.

We had power campsite for 2 nights, staff, service and specially the kids activities was great. 10/10

Amazing place. We had a blast. Bonus is that we could bring our fur babies. Huge dog pool park and nice playground for the kids.

The perfect spot, my doggo is happy as here massive dog park, dog day care and the staff genuinely loves animals oh yeah my kids think its alright two haha

Cozy cabins were a lot smaller than we were led to believe.  No way 6 people could fit in these cabins. The verandah covering was only part way across with hardly any cover from the rain. Toilet was faulty and needed to be adjusted a few times to make it flush. Pool and slide area was  fun but pool area is not supervised so trying to get a spot in the spa was difficult with the 15 kids and 5 adults in there at once (Spa only meant to have 8 people at a time)  Unsupervised children turning the Spa off and on constantly made for an unpleasant experience.  The camp kitchen was clean and well presented but was taken over by a number of families having a party so only 1 table out of the 6 was available.  All 3 ovens were in use by said party and we waited over an hour to use one.  (Grumpy/hungry kids by then) The playground was great.  Not sure if I would return.  Not really sure if you can call it a holiday park when you have permanent residence.

We love it it’s so clean , staff are beautiful highly recommend love it got Notting to say bad it .

Large, pet friendly grassy powered sites
Beautiful pool area, fantastic amenities
As relaxed or as busy as you wish!!
And here comes the 3pm train! Whoo whoo

Absolutely stoked with the location, facilities and service so far! The food at Nibbles was great and well priced.

Great caravan park! Amazing facilities for the kids.

Family of 5 (2A, 3C) staying on a Premier Evergreen site and honestly—what’s not to love? The amenities, location, and facilities are all top-notch, and the staff are so friendly and welcoming. The kids are already asking when we can come back!

The value for money is incredible—the water park and pool alone are worth the site fees. 🌴

Great place to go with kids, there is lots to do and everything is very well maintained. Just be warned, because it is right next to the highway you hear cars all night long

Highly recommend!

4th time at the big 4 Gold Coast holiday park, and it never disappoints! Love the facilities for kids, as well has most awesome camp kitchen, so much for kids to do! Will be back many more times!

Greta park for a quick family staycation close to home. The kids love it here. Can’t fault their amenities & service. Recommend

Love this place

A very fun park! Easy check in and lovely service from the girls at the front desk. Swimming pool, waterpark and spa pool kept the kids entertained even on a rainy day! ❤️ Thanks Big4 Gold coast!

Cant comment on rooms, got a camp-site. Great customer service.

Would like laundry in the villas

Great overall experience kids love the pool even with rain and colder weather
+++ ordering food from cabanas and not having to go wait in line to pickup
Only down side car parks are to small when next to others

This is the most amazing facilitated caravan park ive ever  stayed at they have thought of everything its pure luxury the food is sensational and doggy friendly a big five stars from me

it’s our second time staying at the big 4 in Helensvale and I can honestly say it’s even better than the first! During our previous stay the cafe had a restricted menu due to upgrades but is now open. Food is great, staff are friendly and facilities are second to none!! We will definitely be back for future stays!

We absolutely love this place and have just booked again for November - the facilities, staff and rooms are incredible and great proximity to everything you need!!

Great stay as always. Even with a considerable amount of rain we all still had a great time

Weq Currently staying at Gold Coast Holiday Park and I figured I’d write this review while I actually have 30 seconds of peace… which tells you everything you need to know already.

First up — this place is dangerous. Not in a bad way… but because my kids have now decided this is the standard for all future holidays. Thanks for setting the bar ridiculously high.

From the minute we arrived, it’s been smooth sailing. Check-in was easy, staff are absolute legends, and the park is so clean and well kept it feels like someone’s following us around tidying up (if that’s the case, thank you — please come home with me).

The kids? Haven’t stopped. Between the water park, playgrounds, and just running around like they’ve had 14 Red Bulls, they are absolutely loving life. I’ve seen them briefly… usually when they need food… or money… or both.

Amenities are spotless — and I mean “double-checking if they’re brand new” level clean. Big tick.

Location is spot on too. Close enough to everything on the Gold Coast, but far enough away that you’re not dealing with constant chaos. It’s the perfect mix of fun and actually being able to relax.

Overall vibe: family-friendly, super well run, and somehow still relaxing for adults… which feels like a rare achievement when kids are involved.

Anyway, I’d keep writing… but I’ve just been called back to duty as the official snack provider.

We’ll 100% be back — assuming we ever manage to convince the kids to Currently staying at Gold Coast Holiday Park and I figured I’d write this review while I actually have 30 seconds of peace… which tells you everything you need to know already.

Amenities are spotless — and I mean “double-checking if they’re brand new” level clean. Big tick.

Overall vibe: family-friendly, super well run, and somehow still relaxing for adults… which feels like a rare achievement when kids are involved.

Anyway, I’d keep writing… but I’ve just been called back to duty as the official snack provider.

We’ll 100% be back — assuming we ever manage to convince the kids to This is the 7th time we have stayed here. As always the service is amazing the facilities and amenities are well maintained and the staff are friendly. Our children always enjoy themselves as there is so much to do no time to be bored. We will be returning again for sure. Alissia

We travelled from Melbourne to qld and stayed with a few different parks and this is by far my favourite. We will definitely be back.
This park has everything to offer for kids and family.
There's a reason why big4 is rated the best parks in Australia.

This is basically staying somewhere with a built in babysitter!! What an amazing park with so much for the kids to do, they are entertained the whole time and you can relax by the pool with a cocktail in hand! and if you bring your furry friend there is even an on site doggy day care. We will definitely be back to visit in future.

Great place to holiday, great facilities and staff are amazing and always available to help.

Fantastic place to stay! Beautiful pool area and super fun water park. Rooms are very clean and comfortable, had everything we needed. Staff were lovely, went above and beyond to make our stay more enjoyable. 10 out 10, highly recommend.

Our 4th time staying at Big 4 Gold Coast, rooms always neat and clean and amenities are good. Pool and water park always a hit for the kids. Will definitely be back again.

So far my family are loving it been on the go-karts this morning been in the pool it’s such an amazing place to stay recommend it to everyone

This is a great place to come with kids. Everything is very kid friendly and well designed. We stayed in a 2 bedroom terrace right near the water park and cafe. It was great to be close to all the main facilities. We went during the week (not on school holidays) and it was very quiet. If you have little kids, call ahead and check the height restrictions for the water park, there are some slides that are off limits to shorter children. But all round an awesome stay!

Great location, best Caravan park we have stayed in so far travelling North from Melbourne. Quality of finishes and friendly staff, clean premises and endless options of activities for the family make this park one to return to.

Stayed here with our van. Great location to visit all the theme parks. Staff are super friendly and helpful. Waterpark is next level !

Stayed in a Family Cabin (3 Adults, 3 Children). The rooms were very clean, Location is great. Map was marked clearly and reception staff gave clear directions on how to get from reception to the cabin.

Pool was great and clean, waterpark was fun with lifeguards ready on every floor.

My children thoroughly enjoyed themselves.

The girls in the cafe were very friendly and helpful. The breakfast burger was massive and messy😎

Family friendly, even your four legged friends are welcomed and catered for... Highly recommended the stay...

We had a fantastic stay at the Gold Coast Big 4. The park is tidy, modern, and really well maintained, which made it feel comfortable from the moment we arrived. The water park was a standout — perfect for keeping the kids entertained and a great feature of the park.
The location is very convenient with easy access in and out, making it a great base for exploring the area. Our caravan site was generously sized, and we especially enjoyed the evergreen turf sites — they looked great and made the space feel a bit more premium.
Overall, a really enjoyable stay and we’d definitely come back.

Very neat, tidy and modern with all the amenities you need to make your stay enjoyable. Kids had a great time…

Very happy first time visitor will return, excellent for young families

We had a fantastic family stay at BIG4 Holiday Parks. The park was clean, well maintained, and perfect for families.

There was so much for the kids to do with great pools, playgrounds, and plenty of space to play, which made our stay so enjoyable and relaxing.

Our accommodation was comfortable, practical, and had everything we needed. Staff were friendly and welcoming throughout.

The location was also great, close to major attractions while still feeling like a holiday getaway. We made beautiful family memories and would happily stay again. Highly recommend for families

Loved our terrace and the location! Perfect getaway for our fam of 3 :)

We had a booking for the weekend, we had to cancel as I was admitted to ER and quite ill. When emailed big 4 I was pointed at the cancellation rules so we lost $460 3 day powered ensuite site. Shame on you GC big 4
Eda

Clean facilities and very spacious sites for caravans.

super friendly staff,  clean and well maintained amenities and the park and water park is awesome.

We are having such a great stay at BIG4 Gold Coast! Late check-in was super easy and stress-free, which made arriving with kids a breeze. We were also lucky enough to receive an upgrade to a beautiful 3-bedroom Oasis Villa—such a lovely surprise and absolutely perfect for our family.

The poolside breakfast was delicious and a highlight of our stay. Overall, everything felt relaxed, easy, and well thought out. We can’t wait to book again!

It’s the best caravan park we have stayed at! Service was perfect they even escort you to your site. It is kid heaven so much to do. The bathrooms were superb! Cleanest I have seen. Highly recommend

Cabin was spacious for 7 people.  Cafe had a great selection of food. The kids enjoyed the pool, watermark and playground. Would highly recommend.

Great holiday park, the kids loved the pool and water park. Very unique.
The staff are friendly and helpful and the booking process was seamless.
The bungalow was great value and heaps of room for the family, very clean inside. Just many spiders around the outside 🕷️ ha

It's waking distance from the main parksn and some restaurants and there's a bus stop at the front that goes through all the theme parks and to the main tram/train line which takes you to the coast and everywhere else. Super convenient location!

There are tesla chargers available, i assume for free. Great if you're planning a trip with an EV.

Will be coming back next time

Great location for all things Gold Coast!
Staff are exceptional and facilities are clean and look newly renovated

Lots of current renovations but doesn’t impact your stay at all

Camp sites a little close together but easy to set up and clean all around

The park is super clean, well maintained, and has a really relaxed, family-friendly vibe. The sites are spacious and easy to get into, even with a decent-sized van.
The facilities are a standout amenities are spotless, the camp kitchens are well set up, and there’s plenty to keep the kids entertained with pools, playgrounds, and activities. It’s clear the staff take pride in the place because everything runs smoothly and feels looked after.
Location is also a big plus, close to the theme parks and not far from shops, but still quiet enough to unwind.
Overall, it’s one of those parks you actually look forward to coming back to. Would definitely stay again 👍

Great location. Neat park

We’re on our second trip to Big4 Gold Coast, and we come because there are so many things for our kids to do, but it’s also completely possible to have time out. The cabins are set up well to house families, the activities and open times for the water park ate well timed, and the cafe is well stocked for everyone to find something to eat.
The cleanliness lives a lot to be desired, but overall it’s a pleasant stay for all involved.

We have a premier evergreen site, they are a huge size giving us room to actually be comfortable, so close to all of the amenities and the offerings available are endless! We are loving our time here!

So much for the kids to do, the water slides and pool were a hit. Staff are super friendly. Was also able to get a good deal on theme park tickets.

Con is the noise from the highway is quite loud and constant. Not a deal breaker though.

Kids can’t wait to stay again.

Such an amazing place to stay! The villas are clean, spacious and quiet. Pool slide area massive hit with the kids and so close to movie world and wet and wild! Perfect. Already planning our next trip :)

This is a tough park to review. You really cant fault the service or facilities, however there are a few things to mention.
The traffic noise in the morning from the motorway is next level horrendous. I'm not talking about a little bit of noise, I'm talking about trucks, hooning motorbikes and the drone of traffic waking you up from around 4am every morning. Now I understand this is hardly the fault of the park, hover it needs to be mentioned for those seeking a quieter experience.
If you don't love kids, this isn't the place for you. We did have kids and again, this park is obviously marketed towards families however a few things need consideration. Parents are largely absent, and there is a real danger with the speed at which children fly around on e-scooters and e-bikes in between cars and caravans. I myself took a spill after a young kid rode his scooter through the amenities block area (despite the signs) and took me out trying to avoid another kid. There is certainly not enough emphasis or signage and I believe further rules around enforcement of e-bikes and e-scooters are required. We witnessed many close calls with kids and vehicles.
Great facilities and everything you need is there, but as this is incredibly tight and busy, more rules and enforcement is required.

Amazing park. Family has really enjoyed it.

Well worth it!!

Great location. Kids can fish down the back. Excellent facilities and a very convenient location.

Thanks everyone.

From the crosses.

Wow, what an amazing park!
We honestly underestimated the amount of facilities on offer, we didn't even need to book any activities outside of the park had we known.
Our children are absolutely in their element.

We have loved our stay so far! Excellent facilities and such friendly staff

Absolutely brilliant park with excellent facilities within a short distance to theme parks..   could not ask for a park in its location. Great work guys 👌

What a fantastic park, so close to everything you need! The service has been amazing - so friendly and accommodating. The park is awesome, the waterslides get a big tick from our kids!

What a place! We haven’t been for years and were pleasantly surprised by all the upgrades. The kids (and big kids at heart!) are loving the water slides, the park and daily activities. All with the bonus of amazing food and drinks on site. We’ll definitely be back!

Very helpful staff, great amenities, and a fabulous place for kids. The water park is awesome! Highly recommended for a family getaway, especially so close to the theme parks.

We are so relaxed and loving our stay

Amazing place with amazing facilities. Great for family fun!!

Incredible resort-style stay with the charm of a caravan park. The resort suite was surprisingly luxurious, sleeping up to 10 with three full bathrooms — perfect for families. Great facilities, especially the water slide park, plus excellent food from Nibbles Café and the woodfired pizza. Super convenient location near the theme parks. Easily could have stayed longer.

Family of 6- 2 adults 4 children .
First time staying at big4 holiday park and we travelled from Sydney. Our kids are having the time of their lives. We are loving the pool and water slides ! Kids have enjoyed the jumping pillow too. We are about to head out to the karts and I know our family will have the best time on the karts too!

Great place for a family holiday

Booked for a little camping getaway, facilities were awesome kids had a good time loved the water park and little bit of quiet time fishing

Great camp spot!! Staff are very accommodating and friendly! All amenities are clean and well taken care of!

We had a fantastic stay at Gold Coast Holiday Park BIG4. The facilities were clean and well maintained, the staff were friendly and helpful, and there was plenty to keep the kids entertained. The location is great, close to everything but still peaceful. We’ll definitely be back!

We have spend a couple of days at the park so far. The staff have been polite  and very helpful. Love having a Cafe on-site. Rooms clean, modern and very relaxing. The cabanas are great at the pool but should have a time limit.

Nice size park great amenities, large sites.

Staff are friendly and helpful. Motel room is clean and fresh, close to park facilities and theme parks.

Very happy with this park good service kept clean well maintained staff is always friendly amenities are immaculate especially love the kitchen would come back to this place again and again

Easy to see why it is one of the best parks in the country. Clean, well-maintained, all the usual things the kids love plus construction making more. And the water slides! Only thing you could maybe fault is the noise from the highway. If we were in the van and near the front id probably hear it but this time we are in a villa (and the villa is exceptional) so I have literally only positive things to say about this park.

I have only been here for a couple days but it's pretty nice so far. My only complaints would be that the window in the bathroom seems to be broken because there's no way to latch it closed so it keeps springing open which has been a bit annoying and the blinds aren't enough to make the room dark enough to get to sleep very easily especially since there is a light right outside the windows that we can't turn off. Very cool water park though and super easy to get to the theme parks from here!

I recently stayed at BIG4 Gold Coast Holiday Park and honestly, it exceeded all my expectations!

We are French and visiting from New Caledonia, and we felt incredibly welcomed from the moment we arrived.

We booked a powered site for our car with electricity and water, and when we initially had an issue with our power connection, the staff were incredibly responsive and helpful. They came quickly to fix the problem, and everything worked perfectly afterward. Their professionalism and kindness really stood out.

Throughout our stay, the team was always available to answer our questions and guide us — they were patient, attentive, and made everything very easy for us.

The facilities are absolutely outstanding. The bathrooms and toilets are spotless — not just clean, but beautifully maintained, with unique touches like aquariums that make the place feel special. The kitchen and fridge areas are also extremely clean and very well organized.

The pool area is fantastic! With slides and fun water features, it’s perfect for kids, but also a great place for adults to relax and enjoy the atmosphere. It’s a very friendly environment where it’s easy to meet people and feel part of a community.

Overall, this park offers the perfect combination of comfort, cleanliness, and a warm, welcoming atmosphere. We highly recommend it to anyone visiting the Gold Coast, we will definitely come back!

Great poolside cafe, spa, and amazing water park slides (my sons favourite)

BIG4 Gold Coast is a fantastic destination for keeping kids entertained for hours. There’s no shortage of activities to burn off energy, from the massive waterpark with multiple slides to the jumping pillow and wide open green spaces perfect for kicking a footy. The park has a very family-friendly atmosphere, with kids riding bikes and scooters throughout. On top of that, the facilities are excellent.

Staying in a caravan so can’t comment on rooms. But location is fantastic, close to everything the GC has to offer, the service is amazing with cafe opening at 7am offering fantastic coffee, amenities and clean. Pool and waterpark are loads of fun for the whole family & staff have been super friendly throughout the whole park. 10/10 and will definitely be back.

The atmosphere and amenities are fantastic and the restaurant great value pool and slides my kids loved spent most of time there

Kids love the place.

While the park itself is amazing especially for what it offers the children (one of the best we have been too) ,  the size of the caravan sites and space and the amenities are fantastic we unfortunately didn’t end on a great note when it came to help from the staff.  Our car broke down on the motorway and had to be towed to a mechanic, we were then told we couldn’t continue to stay at the park as they said we needed a car onsite with us that could tow our van. We then had to get a tow truck to remove the caravan from the park and our family with 2 children. We let them know the tow truck was on its way and had no assistance from staff on the best and easiest way for the tow truck driver to get out and it was not easy getting the size of the truck with our caravan out of the park. This shocked me as when we entered the park we had to wait for assistance to be shown to our site then nothing when we were stuck when leaving. We were even more shocked that we had to leave, after already being there for 5nights, no where to go due to not having a car even though they had the ability to keep us on our site for a further 4 nights before it was booked out.

I couldn't believe the water at the WaterPark was heated! It was awesome! No cueing for slides.

The staff have been super helpful and the room is lovely and clean!

This is our third and most impressive stay here. We’re well aware of the fantastic facilities but the service and staff have been so amazing and helpful. My AuDHD son wanted to surprise his dad with coffee from the nibbles cafe with his own money. He rode his scooter up but unfortunately he didn’t have enough money, the wonderful staff gave him the coffee anyway. Dad was stoked, and my son very pleased with himself. Thank you Nibbles Cafe staff, you made our day.

Accommodating staff, lovely new and set up safari tents! Perfect for our family!

I stayed in a family cabin and it was very comfortable. Mattress was really comfy and so were the pillows. Loved the convenience of the park and I didn’t have to leave the place, my three kids (age 4,6,9) were entertained the entire time. We only did a few of the activities and they loved them. Nice vibes with heaps of other kids there too. The coffee was really good too! Had a couple of cocktails and that was a really nice touch by the pool. Spent a lot of $$ but worth it for the memories my kids made.

We stayed here because it was so close to the theme parks and the extensive facilities looked amazing. It didn't disappoint. The kids were into everything - the pool, water park, jumping pillow and games room. Having the option to cook in our cabin or eat at the pool cafe made evenings hassle free. Movie World & Wet'n'Wild were a 20 minute walk or 3 minute bus ride from the bus stop outside the park gates. Highly recommend staying here if you're in the Gold Coast. We'll be back.

Camping for a few nights with the fam, awesome pool area and unreal facilities! Will definitely stay again!

This is the best caravan park I’ve been to anywhere in Australia. The pool is great and always the right temperature. The staff are friendly, the cafe is amazing, and the grounds are immaculate. Plus the weather is great and the theme parks are right there. Awesome!

We were pleasantly surprised by some unexpected features, such as being able to pre order dinner from the cafe online. The wide selection of food, drinks and dessert choices catered for everyone. Wood-fired pizzas, margaritas, cocktails and frappes. Being able to order food and having it delivered to your cabana by the pool is fantastic. They have all the other bases covered, clean accommodation, awesome pool and waterslides, kids activities, basketball court, footy oval and even a dog park! They’ve got it all here!

Very happy with our stay, the caravan park, pools and splash pro are clean.

Able to get a cabana and sun lounge regularly even with a full pool area.

First time staying at this park and what an amazing experience. So many activities for the kids, the water park being a big hit.
Modern clean amenities, love the aquarium and music in the bathroom.
A big plus for us was being able to bring our fur kids who were welcome at the Nibbles Cafe - so we could enjoy a bite to eat, plus a huge dog park for them to let off steam.
Already planning our next holiday!

Really good location, freeway is close but quiet enough in the accommodation for it to not keep you awake. Amenities are great, the kids spent hours on the water slide and balloon. Service was quite reasonable considering how busy they were, all staff were friendly and the coffee is great

Public buses right out the front for family theme park travel. Well insulated clean and comfortable villas with temp controlled split systems. Water slides and combined splash park are entertaining our kids for HOURS! Thankyou!

Loads of seasonal activities here for all ages.
And pets are welcome too 🥰
Amenities are clean and tidy, and the grounds are easy to get around and maintained exceptionally well.
The staff are friendly and helpful.
Food and drinks are a bit pricey, but they have good deals, discounts, offers and incentives running all the time.
My family and I have been coming here for years, and will do so till my kids have their kids.
Definitely worth it for a great family vacation. ☺️🙏🏼

We used their premium campsite and were very happy with the experience.
- in and out process was really easy and the campsite was nice and clean.
- handy amenities, washing, common room, kitchen, dump site.
-game zone, pool and lots of other activities for kids.
-The place felt safe for kids to ride the bike.
- perfect location.

The only downside was it was little pricy for our budget but I think easter holiday you need to expect it.

Overall I was very happy with my stay there. Definitely recommend it.

Very nice accommodation even tho just tenting it lovely customer service and clean and enjoyable atmosphere, daughter from nz loves it and wants to make it a yearly trip also very nice to see koalas in there natural habitat a min walk away keep up the great work and the great food

One of the best Big 4 parks that we have visited! Great facilities, large sites, friendly staff, and plenty to keep the kids entertained!

Always a guaranteed great holiday. Staff are so friendly and location is amazing. We love coming here.

Great stay with young kids. Plenty of space and very clean. The pool is very busy and was really hard to use as we were a big group and didn’t have anywhere to sit. But the splash park/water slide area had plenty of space to gather and chill out.

Excellent for our family. Toddler to early teen aged children and they are all happy. So close to theme parks.

Great experience.

Great for families, just wish it was easier to get to the supermarket

Great place to say, very close to the theme parks, place itself has great amenities, we stayed in the cosy cabins, they are not too bad at all

Excellent park. Our boys enjoying their freedom

Having just left a different facility and now here at Big 4, they are miles apart. Great food, well priced and my kids are having a ball at the water park!

Favourite place to stay love the park and pool area. Stay here regularly.

Fantastic place to relax and unwind!

Just the traffic noise that kinda sucks, also missing a spoon or something to stir my coffee ☕

Save your money. Seriously. We discovered our main bed was broken — sunken and slumped in the centre — at 10pm, after a full day of activity. We spent hours trying to sleep through it before finally giving up at 12:30am, packing our things, and driving home in the middle of the night. We didn't stay the second night. We didn't use the cabin the second day. We also only wanted a refund for one night.

What we got instead was Jenny, the Reservations Manager, armed with a policy that would make a medieval toll collector blush: "Any problems must be reported within the first hour of arrival." One hour. Sixty minutes. Never mind that we were out enjoying the property and only discovered a broken bed when we actually tried to sleep in it at night (the way beds are typically used). Because we only inspect our mattress visually the moment we pulled into the driveway, we had, according to Jenny, forfeited any right to complain.

Jenny then offered this gem of a comparison: "What if you were on a plane and the seat was uncomfortable — would you ask for a refund? They still got you from A to B." We pointed out that a more accurate analogy would be boarding the plane standing up, only discovering your broken seat at cruising altitude, suffering through it for hours, and then being forced to jump out mid-flight. She was unmoved.

The park was fully booked that night — no replacement cabin was available regardless — but Jenny still cited the existence of after-hours staff as proof that we could have been helped, conveniently ignoring that there was nothing they could actually do. When we called the next morning, we were told that because we hadn't called at midnight (where no one would have answered), no refund was possible. The second night we never spent? Also non-refundable, naturally. A fresh reason was produced for every question asked.

Here is what Big4's policy actually means in practice: management could lay a pile of towels on the floor, label it a bed, and as long as you don't notice and formally complain within 60 minutes of checking in, you are legally and morally — by their reckoning — obligated to pay for your entire booking. Every night. Whether you slept there or not.

This isn't a hospitality business. It's a policy document with cabins attached. Don't stay here. Happy Easter.

We recently stayed at a BIG4 Holiday Park for the weekend, and unfortunately our experience was very disappointing from start to finish.

We have been coming here for over 5 years and have never had a problem before, which makes this experience even more upsetting.

We had this trip booked well in advance, but only found out on the morning of our stay that the kitchen was under renovation and there would be a very limited menu. This was extremely frustrating, especially as we have a child who requires gluten-free options — there was essentially nothing available for her to eat. Had we been informed earlier, we absolutely would have rescheduled.

On arrival, we were also given the wrong number of wristbands, which added to the disorganisation.

The most upsetting part of our stay, however, was the handling of a payment in the office. I asked to pay a $100 bond for a birthday party booking, and without clearly confirming the amount, I was charged $1250 — the full amount of the party. I tapped my card while we were mid-conversation and didn’t realise the amount that had been processed until afterwards. When I raised this, there was no understanding or empathy shown. I was simply told it was done and that I shouldn’t have tapped my card.

To make matters worse, the manager, Georgina Honda, was extremely dismissive and disrespectful towards both myself and my sister-in-law. Rather than trying to resolve the situation, she told us she had cancelled all future bookings and that we were “blacklisted.” For what — being understandably upset that $1250 was taken from my business account instead of $100?

If the situation were reversed and $1250 was unexpectedly taken from them, I’m sure they would feel just as upset. Taking a moment to understand our side would have gone a long way, but unfortunately that care just wasn’t there.

Overall, this experience left us feeling very let down. Better communication, organisation, and customer care are really needed.

Nestled in the heart of the Gold Coast, the Big 4 Caravan Park in Helensvale offers an unparalleled experience for travelers seeking comfort and adventure. From the moment you arrive, the warm and welcoming atmosphere makes you feel right at home. The park is impeccably maintained, with spacious and clean amenities that cater to every need. Whether you're setting up in a cozy cabin or pitching a tent, the surrounding lush greenery and well-thought-out layout create a serene retreat.

But what truly sets this place apart is its proximity to local attractions, making it an ideal base for exploring the Gold Coast. You'll find yourself just a stone's throw away from thrilling theme parks, pristine beaches, and vibrant shopping districts.

Now, let's talk about Nibbles Café, a hidden gem adjacent to the park. This charming café has quickly risen to the top of my list for the best meals in town. The menu is a delightful fusion of flavors, showcasing fresh, locally sourced ingredients. Whether you're craving a hearty breakfast to kickstart your day or a light lunch to refuel, Nibbles Café has something for everyone. Their signature dishes are bursting with flavor, and the presentation is simply top-notch.

And then there's the coffee—oh, the coffee! I can honestly say I’ve never tasted anything quite like it on the Gold Coast. Each cup is brewed to perfection, with rich aromas and a velvety texture that dances on your palate. It's the perfect companion to their scrumptious pastries, making for a delightful morning ritual.

In summary, whether you're staying at the Big 4 Caravan Park or just visiting Nibbles Café, you’re in for a treat. The combination of a welcoming environment, exceptional meals, and outstanding coffee makes this destination a must-visit. If you're looking for a memorable getaway and a culinary experience that will leave you wanting more, look no further. I can’t wait to return!

Third time visiting this awesome park. Amazing options for all family’s. Pool is amazing and waterslides are super fun. It’s also close to movie world and dreamworld.  I would recommend anyone come try this amazing place for your next getaway adventure.

Very well looked after spacious room and great for kids to be entertained will stay again

Dirty, and expensive… for what?
The slides are fun, but the pool was dirty and warm!!!
Rude staff in the cafe.
Not worth the money.

Very convenient location, friendly staff, plenty of things to enjoy within the park, peaceful environment and lovely villas! An exciting place for kids to stay as well as adults!

My family and I just stayed at the BIG4 Gold Coast Holiday Park for our week-long vacation, and it was seriously the best decision ever. It's an awesome spot for kids of all ages with all the cool facilities and amenities they offer. We stayed in one of the cottages, which was perfect for us, we just wish we had more time to hang out and enjoy everything. The staff were super nice and friendly, the food from the cafe was great, and the pizzas were fresh and delicious, totally worth the wait on a busy night.
I'd totally recommend it and would definitely stay there again.

We are currently staying in the motel section and it’s fantastic! So close to the pool and cafe. Facilities are great and staff are friendly and helpful.

Sehr cooler Park

Absolutely amazing place to take a break, unwind, let loose and enjoy your time on the Gold Coast! Amazing ammenities that are cleaned multiple times a day and to a great standard. You can cook, easily use disability friendly showers and family bathrooms (bathtub is a rare touch we loved!) and you can see the movie world rides from the campsites that’s how close you are to the theme parks. Staff go beyond to make your stay here as wonderful as they can no matter your circumstances or walk of life. Their kindness goes a long way and kudos to the chef for the delicious food here as I’m qualified myself and haven’t had such nice meals daily from a big 4 venue before. Will be returning frequently as we travel in our camper until we find a forever home! Very much a community based holiday park not just for the kids but also the adults and single people. Super inclusive. :)

Water park is fabulous for kids. Food at Cafe especially pizza was very good- exceeded expectations. Walking distance to theme parks.

Fantastic place to stay there are 9 of us the reception area catered so well for all of us especially organising our theme park tickets
This is the best park for all ages
Will definitely be coming back

Absolutely love this place, you’ve got everything in the one spot! Even better in the middle of the theme parks 👏🏾😆🙂

Awesome place.
Thats why i came back again

One of my favorite area with my littles ^^

Awesome little 2 night getaway! Great facilities and the cosy cabin was perfect size for myself and my daughter

Great place to vacation with the kids. Love the water park

Cleaning of room couldve been alot better. Floor of room was sandy on arrival, sticky food stains/spills on dining table, rice bubbles and melted cheese on coffee table.

Great family park with lots to do , we have been having a fantastic time

We’ve been here 4 times and every time it never disappoints! We camp and the sites are lovely, great location and close to amenities and pool/waterpark. Food & drink are incredible. My kids spend hours on the amazing water park! Highly recommend this place to everyone!!

This was one of the best holiday parks I've been to. There were lots of activities to do and some of the staff were really nice. The toliets were quite clean and the location was the best as it was close to Movie World and Wet'n Wild and not too noisy. Very convenient. The price was slightly expensive but still fine and the noise level wasn't too loud and just perfect. One thing I would like to say is that if you have a dog, it's best you have a friend in the gold coast to look after it because for the doggy day care, our labrador was supposed to be fed at 12:00 noon but when we picked her up at 3:30, she wasn't fed and also, we had to wait a little while for the doors to be open because nobody was there. A bit more responsible staff would be good. But some staff were very responsible.||When we were in the swimming pool, we had to be evacuated due to a thunderstorm. The person who called us out made sure everyone was there safely and even when there wasn't, he made sure everyone was out by around 8:00pm. Dog park was great but a bit more stuff there would be awesome (most dog free holiday parks doesn't). Though, the swimming pool was a little salty, everyone had a great time and it was an unforgettable experience. And if you see this review, you definitely have to come here. 🎊🎉🦮

Reception, very clean and helpful

Staying in a cosy cabin for a week, very well appointed cabin.
Very fresh and almost new.
Excellent large fridge perfect for the family.
Cafe is in a perfect location overlooking the pool. Check out the frozen cocktails! ❤️

Fantastic place to stay. Cafe has great food and very friendly staff.

Oh my gosh this was the best time of my life can’t believe the amenities for everyone including disabled people this is awesome to see lovely home vibe awesome water park great seafood can not complain one bit, thankyou for having us at the big 4 it’s full of the 4, as someone struggling they are so accommodating and it’s a safe vibe, Rodney stays unlocked keys in her nothing gets touched everything you want in the big 4!

Great park, great stay!

As a single mum using my camper for the first time I had trouble packing it up. I really appreciated the extra time/late check out they gave me and a staff member offering to help as I was latching on but when I asked if we could stay for a quick swim and lunch at the cafe I was told no we're fully booked and at full capacity. As I looked around at all the empty campsites and put my crying kids (wanting to have one last swim) in the car I thought what a disappointing end to such a lovely holiday. Customer service could definitely improve and you've lost me as a customer. My mum was staying there too and sent me this photo just before sunset on the "fully booked" day.

This is our second time here and it's an ideal place to spend the holidays, with the added bonus of the theme park just a 3-minute drive away.

Beautiful place so great with kids. Very happy with our choice.

Very good stay, would be nice to have another toilet block closer to campers out the back. Seems to be all at one side of the park.

Place is fantastic, perfect for the kids!
Bikes or scooters are a must, each time the kids ride around the group gets bigger, so many activities and such a tidy clean place. Perfect for dogs too, dog wash, dog daycare etc we’ll be bringing our pups next time around! Ensuite sites are fantastic. -Porscha R

Really happy with the Terraces! I was initially concerned with it being close to the slides but it’s been amazing!
The slides are great the food is pretty good as well
Oh and happy hour is 2-4 😉

Rooms are fairly new with great air conditioning (staff had them running for us when we arrived), although no AC in the kids room meant they were a bit warm trying to sleep. Park amenities with the water park and QR code ordering straight to the table is fantastic.

The Walker family can not recommend this place enough-if you’re thinking of booking just do it -you won’t regret it. The cocktails are amazing too!

Great location and friendly, helpful staff!

Best park around, water park is awesome, although the pool is wayyy too warm. Shouldn't be heated when it's so hot. Kids love it here

Currently staying here with my husband and two kids ages 5 and 2 and honestly this place has blown us away!
We are staying in the Oasis 2 bedroom cabin and love it. It's modern, spotless, spacious and surprisingly private yet still plenty of room to spread out without feeling on top of each other.
The park itself is fantastic. There's so much to do that the kids are constantly entertained, yet it still feels relaxing rather than chaotic. It’s the perfect balance for families who want fun and downtime.
Location wise, it's so close to the theme parks, but far enough away to actually feel like a proper break at the end of the day and plenty of shops and a tavern within walking distance.
You can tell it's really well run as the grounds are immaculate, everything works as it should and the overall vibe is welcoming and family friendly without being over the top.
Hands down one of the best caravan park stays we’ve been to and we've stayed at a few. We’ll absolutely be back and will be recommending this to everyone we know!

Australia Day at Big 4 Gold Coast 10/10
Such a fun vibe with sausage sizzle , Aussie tunes pumping and water toys, zooper doopers and chips being passed around by energetic staff members who really helped set the mood -
Can’t wait for the glow party Disco tonight
We will be back next year for sure !

Great spot. Almost don't need to leave the grounds.  Love the pedal parts!!

Honestly everything was amazing, 10/10 would do again

name: Broadwater Tourist Park
all_reviews_text:
Well done guys.
Being managers ourselves we took a break. Decided your park. Ensuite site for week, we ended up coking in early. Also had cabin for my dad for few nights to catch up.
Cabin oh my god how spacious, clean and well appointed. Liked the cabin area itself around the pool.

The ensuite was clean and water pressure on point and hot, was great during the week of rain.
Meeting security walking around at night one morning, was very friendly young man. Your staff were friendly also.
Well done. And yeah nah we will stick to regional parks. We will return, may even make it a family break destination, thank you for our stay.

Great park. Well done.

Nice place powered sites check in 11am which I never came across before

It is amazing we have been going here for years and we will be coming back for years to come can't recommend it highly enough the people are great the staff are amazingly friendly the whole park is just amazing the kids love it so much for them to do and its perfectly in the middle of everything just cant enough of how much we enjoy being there and can't wait to get back there

We had a caravan site and it was a very clean park.

We come here every year and have done for 10 years now and would be for the next 10 years so if you want an amazing place to come the park is perfect

Front desk friendly and accomodating. Park ammenities clean, and excellent condition. Location could not be faulted.

Front desk friendly and accomodating. Park ammenities clean, and excellent condition. Location could not be faulted.

We love the park not just because of the location , and the clean amenities and the beautifully manicured grounds but because we are made to feel sooooo welcome and wanted .. well done guys. Can’t wait to come back!

The staff when checking in are so lovely and we feel like we have come 'home'. The men on the mower always wave happily and say gday. Cleaning staff are very courteous and friendly. The pancakes - omg

We’ve stayed several times before and really like this Park. The amenities are always clean and there are plenty of facilities (large camp kitchens, two pools, jumping pillow, playground, etc). Will definitely stay again.

We love the park not just because of the location , and the clean amenities and the beautifully manicured grounds but because we are made to feel sooooo welcome and wanted .. well done guys. Can’t wait to come back!

One of the best caravan parks.  Our favourite.

10/10! This place is amazing! Friendly staff, heaps to do and the cabins were so spacious and affordable!

Friendly and efficient staff, grounds and facilities kept clean and functioning. Terrific location lots of things to do close by. Good sized sites.

Great park. In particular we thought the maintenance staff were excellent. We watched as a staff member visited the amenities very early (5am) to make sure supplies were topped up each day. The grounds were looked after once again early each day. The admin staff were courteous and efficient. So definitely will be back to enjoy the wonderful location of the park

Great park right on the water . Easy walk to shops resturaunts and light rail . Loved our stay here .

Great park. In particular we thought the maintenance staff were excellent. We watched as a staff member visited the amenities very early (5am) to make sure supplies were topped up each day. The grounds were looked after once again early each day. The admin staff were courteous and efficient. So definitely will be back to enjoy the wonderful location of the park

Absolutely love the location. Being able to fish off the shore behind the park, beautiful clean facilities & well maintained sites. Staff are absolutely wonderful & extremely helpful. Communication from the park was excellent with what was happening. Wood fired pizzas were AMAZING! Cannot recommend highly enough.

It was a pleasure to stay at the park. It Is clear yourselves (park managers) and staff take alot of pride in the park and ensuring guests have a great experience with ensuring sites, amenities and overall grounds were clean and very well presented.

It was a pleasure to stay at the park. It Is clear yourselves (park managers) and staff take alot of pride in the park and ensuring guests have a great experience with ensuring sites, amenities and overall grounds were clean and very well presented.

Nous avons utilisé ce parking pour garer notre van pendant 2 nuits (120 dollars australiens)
Nous avons adoré : eau, électricité, douche, toilettes. Tout est propre. C’est très calme. Piscine et comme un gros trampoline. Personnel très accueillant et aimable. On recommande sans hésité !!

Reception staff are great and always try to accommodate your needs, Amenities are kept clean and the park location is great.

Reception staff are great and always try to accommodate your needs, Amenities are kept clean and the park location is great.

Great park. Perfect location. Clean amenities. We will be back.

Beautiful clean park. Great amenities and lovely staff.  Just lovely.

Our holiday was exactly what we were looking for, hassle free, relaxing, great facilities and peaceful surrounds.

The facilities were super clean; all the staff went the extra mile to ensure our holiday although sort was memorabile.

We have stayed at many locations on the coast over the years, but this was by far the best. The park caters for everyone.

We will definitely be going back for future holidays, we highly recommend the Broadwater Tourist Park.

Great facilities, grassed sites, excellent swimming pool. Close to theme parks. Can be tight for parking caravan- get there earlier in day.

Lots to see and do here

Just a normal average tourist park. Depending on what you want to. It has a boat ramp, fish cleaning station. Run of the mills kids playground, games room, pool. Laundry facilities, toilet blocks ECT. Some food shops across the road. Short drive many locations of possible interest.

Reallly enjoyed our stay here. Enough room for everyone and so much to do. We only stayed 2 nights but could easily do a week here without being bored.

We stayed here over the Australia Day long weekend, absolutely perfect spot, easy to manage caravan site, very welcoming staff, close to beach, shops, restaurants, will definitely be returning!

Extremely friendly staff 10/10

Been here for 22 years and will be here for many more years at Christmas time my kids were babies and now there Adult's who now book there own site with there children that how much this place is amazing to us the mangers the staff give you 100 percent service please if you havent been here go . As you will be like us and keep going back .

Great place to camp, so close to cafes and parks for the kids.

We can't thank you enough, we have been going here for well over 12years. after the storm Christmas day, you guys did an unbelievable job of looking after everyone. You guys are the best, Thank you Team

10 days here with the family - 7 of us on all over the Christmas New Year break.
Could not have been happier with the park and the managers especially Matt and his team. Their dedication to service and making everything easy has made our stay here memorable.
Christmas Day storm which resulted in evacuation- could not have been better managed.  Information was constantly forthcoming and staff were kind and very considerate. Perfect clean amenities camp kitchen were great and the park organised activities well received!  Two thumbs up!!!

Fabulous location and park.

I visited my family staying at this tourist park and found it well maintained and the pool and other facilities interesting.

Great place family friendly, pool beach amenities clean excellent holidays

Location is excellent ,views and beach

Love this place will always come back 💞

Excellent. Very accommodating

Location was great. Staff were friendly and helpful.
Cabin was neat and tidy,  also newer and bigger than I expected for such a good price.

Great spot , friendly  check in folk

Our powered site was close to the main promenade road which resulted in significant road noise from 6am - 8pm. Many sites closer to the waterfront would not be affected by this issue.

Park, staff and facilities were well maintained.

Great Spot - had a waterfont Caravan Site. Very easy self check-in & Check-out. Very good communication (via Text messages) from the staff on events & during our stay - including the weather issues. Well done folks

Great park, very clean and close to everything.
Loved the food & coffee vans that come in, very convenient. Amenities are very clean & staff are friendly. Would definitely come back.

From the moment we arrived we felt welcome. The staff were extremely friendly and very knowledgeable about the area. The cabin was perfect and had everything we needed for our 5 night stay and conveniently located to everything! The amenities were excellent with 2 pools, jumping pillow, playground and games room to keep our 3 kids entertained in between theme park visits! On site laundry facilities also meant we didn’t have to take a truck load of laundry home with us and the kiosk has everything that you may have accidentally forgotten. We can’t wait to visit again!!

The Attwood family from Ballarat, Victoria

We had a water view site and wow what a location.  Loved this caravan park. The facilities were very good and everything was very clean and tidy. Easy contact less check-in.  Close enough to everything that people love about the Gold Coast, yet far enough away from the hustle and bustle.

We will be back 😁.

Good location is all I can say, 26ft van nearly impossible to get in the area allocated, had to move to another spot, only lucky there was no-one opposite us so we could get in, very busy park,

We had a great ensuite site opposite park with good open views across to the water.   Ensuite shower was really good and Broadwater Tourist Park is in an excellent location within easy reach of everything you would want.  Try the Southport Surf Lifesaving Club for dinner while you are there.  Also try Maries Pizza which is just down the road - best pizza we have had in a long time.

Went camping for work great set up for participants when it's dry not so great when your hiding from the rain

Nice place, very clean with good amenities. Sites are spacious and staff very friendly.

Such a great place to stay. Very neat and tidy.
Lovely team and very well organised.
Caravan sites very generous and easy to move about.
We will be back for a longer stay next time.

Awesome place and great service.

Enjoyed everything from booking to staying and weather. Staff front desk so helpful and friendly and the extra events organised, pizza and coffee van in particular were nice options too. We loved our site 166 also friendly neighbours along the way. Keep on doing what you're doing we'll be back!

Last minute booking...very hospitable and efficient

Great little spot to stay in the van with the main beach one closed it’s definitely gotten busier good amenities and close to everywhere

친절한 직원들, 깨끗한 시설, 근처에는 멋진 공원도 있습니다. 전반적으로 매우 만족했습니다.

great place to stay

Broadwater tourist park is always our go to park on the coast. The sites are great and the amenities always spotless. The staff go out of their way to help in any way. staying again in November for a week and January for 3 weeks. Holiday activities are always fun. Do yourself a favour and stay st Broadwater

We really enjoyed our stay here. We're coming back next year. Cabin was lovely and fresh, location is amazing, staff were so friendly, amenities clean, playground or kids activities were top notch. Looking forward to our next holiday there.

Great park with clean facilities. Staff are super helpful every time. Can’t wait to go back again this Easter. Sunrises aren’t bad either 😊

"It was a quiet and peaceful stay. Proximity to all services and attractions was fabulous, and restaurants in the area are as good as is possible any where! Public transportation at the gate to go up or down the Gold Coast is very reliable. The amenities are spotless and the security in the park is excellent. Highly recommend this park for all ages."

Staff are always friendly and helpful, the park has great amenities always clean, even when they have any issues you get a text message and always updated. This is our favorite place to stay when on the Gold Coast."

Loved how well maintained the entire park was. The convenient boat ramp in the park made it super easy to get out on the water and also how close it was to the city! Definitely would return back!

When you have been caravaning here for the last 20 years and have the same group of people there each year, tells me that they are doing things right!

Have been going to this caravan park for several years now.
Managers and staff are very friendly and helpful; Park is always clean and tidy. There is always something going on to keep the children entertained. Would highly recommend this caravan park
Brooke and Matt do a fantastic job, credit to you both and other all staff.

We’ve been coming to Broadwater Tourist Park for around 8 years for our Christmas holidays. It’s also been a great spot for birthday weekends and we have even booked a wedding on the waterfront. The park is well kept, staff are friendly, and they always put on good activities during the holidays, including free pancakes and kids disco nights. The park managers, are always smiling and happy to stop and have a chat.

Powered caravan site.
Beautiful, quiet spot right on the waterfront.  Shops and parklands nearby. Perfect for the little ones.

What a great place to stay ..very helpful and plenty space ✨️

Booking is really easy and the staff listen to what type of site you require. Arrival was easy as we did a pre check in, which was perfect. Facilities here are SPOTLESS. Cleaned at least 3 times a day. Don’t be put off by the building site next door. The blokes love to stand there and watch the crane. We loved it so much we have booked our next trip already.

Great site to park up.  The show was on at the same time.  Close to evvvvverything.  We caught the team near by.  Well looked after park.  Being a great park it seems to bring the same people back year after year.  Meet some very friendly neighbours.

Absolutely beautiful location and we couldn’t be happier with our 3 bedroom pool view cabin! Staff were very friendly and helpful! We can’t wait to be back!!

The park is very well run. The lawns and amenities are very clean. The office staff are always helpful. We had a great time here. Thanks

Booking an en-suite powered site at BTP for the last 2 nights of our roadtrip was the finest cherry on top to end our trip. The en-suite was exactly like photos shown, it was immaculate to the point that we felt bad for dirtying the floor cause it was pouring heavily.

On our last day there we were trapped at our site and couldn’t checkout cause our motorhome wouldn’t start. The team got to work immediately (in a downpour!) working with the front desk to get help, them arriving almost immediately to try working on our vehicle, then more back up came - optional solutions were given (had proactively checked that the site was available for another night if needed), but unfortunately we couldn’t stay as we had to leave for the airport as soon as our vehicle is up running.

Huge kudos to the team for jumping on this to help us - even though ultimately road assistance had to be called, the team definitely made us feel wayyy less panicky and frantic. We didn’t catch the name of the guy who helped us throughout but he definitely knows his stuff - he just didn’t have the right tools for our vehicle.

Thank you all once again! :)

Great caravan park
Good amenities
Heated pool
Friendly staff
Well done management team

Great park on the Gold Coast. Well worth a visit.

Great caravan park, cabins, powered sites and tent camping. Jumping castle and kid amenities  with 2 swimming pools.Has its own boat ramp and next to Smith St public boat ramp. Great location, easy walk to Nerang St with heaps of restaurants and takeaway,  petrol stations close by for boats. Close to seaway and wavebreak Is, and Tipplers 20-30 mins away.
A little bit expensive but right on the water on the Goldcoast.
Come here regularly.

Great location.  Gets a bit windy, but on the water, so expect that.  No wifi available.

Great service , the prices are very fair for such a great location.  I have visited this place year after year and love it.

First time here and loved it. Nice big sites great amenities and great staff

We stay here as a running group for the Gold Coast Marathon Event. It’s the best accommodation. A facilities are great the atmosphere within the park is great.
We love staying here and the parents of kids know their kids are safe and have activities to keep them occupied.
5 stars from me

Lovely Park with the best location!! We stayed in our own van on a waterfront view site, the pick of the park!! Great communication and easy arrival process. Park and amenities spotless. Only negative is that for the size of the park, there needs to be 2 dump points, but apart from that, great few days spent!!

Great caravan park.Large sites for caravans. Great facilities.

Amazing site, service and amenities. Will definitely be back

Had an awesome time staying here. Close to water and few walks to restaurants.

This is a Caravan Park on the Broadwater.
Beautiful location at a reasonable cost. Kid friendly for families and elders alike in a reasonably quiet spot.

A great place, so close to everything

Powered slab site was a good size. Staff friendly & helpful. Check in was so easy. Amenities were spotless. This caravan park is in a fantastic location with beautiful parklands walking distance & easy driving to theme parks & shopping. Jumping pillow & 2 pools, heated in winter, kept the grandchildren happy too. The free pancake breakfast (Wed morn) was a special touch. We would definitely stay here again.

What an awesome park  the views are incredible  heaps to keep the children young and old occupied amenities are spotlessly clean the staff are very welcoming close to resturants shopping centre u can do as little as u want or if u want to get about also plenty to entertain come and stay you won't b disappointed.Amazing wild life

Great cabins and great location especially for families.

We stayed on a powered site and enjoyed the view of the Broadwater and the maritime activity.

Great spot.

Have been going for 15 years plus and find it quite enjoyable.

Always good to stay at this Park

Clean, good sized sites, top quality ensuite site, friendly staff 👌

Best caravan Park to stay at close to everything (shop, beach,park ECT)

I've never been to Tourist Park like this. It has all the amenities of camping + the extras you
by tall buildings, close to the mall, and lots of food places . Plenty of things to do if you have children.  I would come  back again.

Power site in caravan

Such an amazing location and the staff are so friendly!

Thank you for an easy stay!

What a great park.  The best views, beach so close, wildlife and ideal spot.  We had a great week here was going to be two but cyclone Alfred changed our plans.  Management were fantastic.   Highly recommended.  We have stayed at almost all of the Gold Coast parks and this was our favorite.  (Site 222 and we almost made it to 188 top sites).

Love this place!! Very easy check in, all done on line! Staff very friendly, very clean, and well maintained!

We always stay at this park when visiting the Gold Coast for concerts or just a holiday.  Great spot and always quiet and clean

A clean and well presented caravan park in ahandylocation. There are plenty of activities for young children. The amenities are modern and satisfactorily maintained.

First time in a tent at this park and still had a pretty good time and staff were friendly and helpful. Normally stay in a spoilt cabin which are fantastic

Great park on the Broadwater. The kids love it here.

The cleanest and quietest spot we found so far. Showers and toilets are absolutely spotless. The pool on the other hand has the same temperature as a hot shower. You might want to lower that a little in the summer 😂

Rebooked for December and bringing both of our sons their wives and our 5 wonderful grandchildren. 3 cabins should be a blast. Love the location love the amenities and staff are helpful and very nice and down to earth. Just a magical place.

Exquisite view of the broadwater park.

Had  site there in October last year when I was working at the v8s for 5 nights absolutely brilliant will be back

Amazing location and customer service was very nice and welcoming, pricing was good and we stayed at an ensuite powered site which was lovely and had to mention the school holidays program for the kids was excellent they had a great time especially the movie night where they projected it on a big screen outside which was so fun. I would recommend

What a wonderful stay we had! The park was great! Service was great! All staff went above & beyond. The park has a great vibe, Can't wait to visit again.

Had a week's holiday with grandchildren. Weather was a bit unfortunate, but they found plenty to do in park, and parkland.
Great pancake brekkie, supplied by parkanagement.
Great staff, helpful, friendly and efficient. Always staying in touch with residents!

Excellent location

For 93 dollars kunne man i det mindste forvente en normal standart for hygiejne, men på toiletterne var der klamt, og fyldt med afføring i hvert eneste toilet. Og samtidig var der ingen wifi tilgængelig. Kan absolut ikke anbefale det..

4 nights on an ensuite caravan site... Very close to the water...
Peaceful and quiet, for a break away from the hustle and bustle!! Highly recommended at any time of the year because of the weather in Queensland...

We were here for the car race.  Very nice caravan park.

All the camping around were sold out but this one and we found out why. Terrible staff. We called at 16:15 to confirm they have campsite available. They confirm and tell us we don't have to book on the phone. We get stuck in traffic, arrive at 18:05 and the reception is already close. We look around and try to find or call someone for half an hour but we see nobody and we don't get our call answered. We just park in the front parking because it's getting dark and everything around is full. At 20:00, a member of the staff come into the parking, shouting at us, to kick us out, refusing to create a booking for us. I didn't believe it was possible to be that rude!

Fantastic Park!! Right on the Broadwater and only a 10min walk to Australia Fair. The amenities and facilities are always in great condition and clean. The management team and staff are great and are always willing to help make your stay a great one! We love this park and often stay here when we are at the Gold Coast….because it’s THE BEST!!!

We had a great stay at Broadwater Tourist Park, best 2 week stay ever. Amenities were great and clean! The staff are amazing and go above and beyond to make your stay wonderful. Great location and activities are planned in the park (pancake breakfast is awesome!!). This is a fantastic park and would I recommend to everyone I know…thanks so much Brooke & Matt!!!

We had a little family get together at Broadwater Tourist Park and the park managers couldn’t be more accommodating with grouping us together. We had three caravan sites and a cabin for an older relative and they managed to group us altogether within 10-20 metres of each other cabin included.

The amenities were always clean and easily accessible, the park location is great with plenty of eateries around and we were even recommended a great seafood restaurant by staff for our family dinner group.

I would highly recommend Broadwater Tourist park for anybody wanting a great weekend in the coast or even longer as there is so much to do.

Le personnel est venu nous faire comprendre sur un ton agressif que nous devions partir et qu'ils ne feront rien pour nous aider. C'était le seul camping des environs avec des emplacement encore disponibles. Aucun effort pour trouver un compromis. We stayed at this beautiful park over the winter and can’t speak more highly of everything we experienced. The amenities are clean, the camp kitchens have everything needed for those who travel lightly and the pools and play equipment are kept clean and tidy. The camp sites are big and can fit some very big rigs and the lawns are maintained daily.
All the staff are extremely welcoming,  pleasant and helpful. The pancake mornings, sausage sizzles and special events are so much fun and a great way to meet other Travellers.
The park is situated near shops and some great restaurants and clubs.
My husband became ill over the period we were there and the onsite Managers Brooke and Matt could not have been more helpful, thank you so much guys.
I can’t recommend this park highly enough and we look forward to returning next year.

This family oriented tourist park is an oasis of kid friendly areas, activities and playground equipment, while still offering the ancient ones a moment of respite to skoll a Café Latte and inhale a restaurant prepared meal of Chicken Parmigiana or an honest Aussie scotch fillet steak, chips and salad, before leaping back into the pint-sized fray. Check in was easy. We received an email which had all the information we needed to get in and find our site.
We had site 121 which was classed as a premium powered site. It had lovely lawn and water views but was a bit tight for our length of around 9m with our ebikes at the back. We had to take the bike rack off so that the rack didn't stick out over the road.
Overall, it was a pleasant stay and I would recommend this park to others.
